The '''''Liberator''-class cruiser''', also '''''Liberator'' Cruiser''', was a powerful frontline [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] designed by the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] to combat [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]]. Although slender and small in size, the [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] boasted a formidable array of weaponry comprising of [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] and [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] batteries, and could carry a complement of six [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] and three [[Troop/Legends|troop]] [[Regiment/Legends|regiments]]. Utilized by both the [[Sullustan Home Guard/Legends|Sullustan Home Guard]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Liberator featured cutting-edge [[Armor/Legends|armor]] plating, [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielding]], and [[Engine/Legends|drive unit technology]] that made it one of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] most advanced [[Warship/Legends|warships]].

==Characteristics==
The ''Liberator''-class cruiser,<ref name="Strongholds of Resistance" /> also known as the ''Liberator'' [[Cruiser/Legends|Cruiser]],<ref name="Rebellion Strategy Guide" /> was a well-armed [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]]<ref name="Strongholds of Resistance" /> manufactured by the<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion" /> [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]]–run<ref name="Strongholds of Resistance" /> [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]. Although diminutive in size,<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion" /> the ''Liberator''-class cruiser bristled with offensive firepower,<ref name="Rebellion Strategy Guide" /> including [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], and [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]].

The Liberator's slender body disguised its capacity to carry up to six [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] and three [[Troop/Legends|troop]] [[Regiment/Legends|regiments]]. The cruiser was also equipped with a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]. Irregularly hexagonal in shape, the Liberator's prow extended in twin slanted mandibles, at the recessed center of which lay two exposed [[Hangar/Legends|launch bays]].<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion" /> With excellent [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielding]],<ref name="Rebellion Strategy Guide" /> state-of-the-art [[Hull/Legends|hull]] [[Armor/Legends|armor]], and new [[Engine/Legends|drive unit technology]], the ''Liberator''-class cruiser stood as one of the most advanced [[Warship/Legends|warships]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion" />

==Role==
Designed as an [[Pirate/Legends|antipiracy]] vessel, the ''Liberator''-class cruiser was built to take on entire [[Fleet/Legends|armadas]] of small pirate craft<ref name="Strongholds of Resistance" /> and proved effectively capable of frontline [[Space warfare/Legends|space combat]]. While formidable against other enemy capital ships, the Liberator tended to be somewhat vulnerable to attacking starfighters.<ref name="Rebellion Strategy Guide" />

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the ''Liberator''-class cruiser numbered among the capital ship designs serving in the [[Sullustan Home Guard/Legends|Sullustan Home Guard]], a fleet established by the SoroSuub Corporation to defend the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] from pirate raids.<ref name="Strongholds of Resistance" /> The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] also utilized the Liberator among its [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|naval forces]] following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Liberator'' Cruiser was an original starship model created for the [[1998]] [[Star Wars video games|PC game]] [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]. The cruiser is available to the Rebel Alliance during gameplay as an advanced design over the [[Quasar Fire-class cruiser-carrier/Legends|Alliance escort carrier]].<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion" /> ''[[Strongholds of Resistance]]'', a [[2015]] supplemental sourcebook for [[Fantasy Flight Games]]' [[Star Wars: Age of Rebellion (roleplaying game)|''Star Wars: Age of Rebellion'']] [[roleplaying game]], later renamed the ship the ''Liberator''-class cruiser.<ref name="Strongholds of Resistance" />
